name: Revocable Trust Transfer Treatment

eligibility.description: Applies to individuals with revocable living trusts who make distributions to third parties from trust assets.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Transfers from a revocable trust (grantor trust) are treated as made directly by the decedent, allowing them to qualify for certain 3-year rule exceptions rather than being treated as a relinquishment of power under section 2038.
